column8: Worthy Farm is the biggest dairy farm in Somerset.
column9: Glastonbury Festival is held once every three years.
column10: Festival-goers have to wear special shoes because of the mud.
column11: Only the top names in rock and pop music perform at the festival.
column12: Stand-up comedy is the most popular type of performance after music.
column13: There's plenty of luxury accommodation available.
column14: People work at the festival for free.
column15: Environmental charities receive most of the profits from the festival.
